name: @northpoint/ai
description: FastAPI AI / agent service (Python). The package.json exists so pnpm + Turborepo can orchestrate dev/build/lint alongside the JS apps.

scripts.build: echo 'apps/ai is a Python service — no JS build step'
scripts.lint: echo 'apps/ai lint is handled by Python tooling (ruff, etc.)'
scripts.typecheck: echo 'apps/ai typecheck is handled by Python tooling (mypy, etc.)'
